violations.description: CONTAMINATION FROM WIPING CLOTHS (2 pts): Wiping cloths noted not stored in adequate sanitizing solution.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Some vent covers and ceilong areas noted in need of cleaning.

IN-USE UTENSILS (1 pts): In use utensils were noted being stored or contacting unclean surfaces. Tongs next to the fryers noted hanging on the freezer door handle. Even though the door and handle is a sanitizable surface this setup is not ideal because of the potencial of contamination from touching the door hnadle with bare hands while loading the freezer etc. A better option might be to use a stainless steel container to keep the tong in either on the shlelf bellow or even in the freezer itself.
FLOORS WALLS CEILINGS (1 pts): Floors in the walk-in cooler and freezer noted in need of cleaning. Some vent covers noted in need of cleaning.
